title: decaloba rohrii
intro: Decaloba rohrii, also known as the Rohri plant, is a medicinal plant that belongs to the family Malpighiaceae. It is traditionally used in various parts of the world, particularly in the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Rohri plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, due to its rich content of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In terms of herbal preparations, the Rohri plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
